heading: Accounts of court officers
label: 1421 Accounts of court officers
text: Whoever, being a clerk or assistant clerk of a court, or other person charged by law with a duty to render true accounts of moneys received in any proceeding relating to citizenship, naturalization, or registration of aliens or to pay over any balance of such moneys due to the United States, willfully neglects to do so within thirty days after said payment shall become due and demand therefor has been made, shall be fined under this title or imprisoned not more than five years, or both.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on subsections (a)(34), (d) and () of , U.S.C., 1940 ed., Aliens and Nationality (, (d), (), , 1168).llsection 746 of title 8Oct. 14, 1940, ch. 876, § 346(a)(34)54 Stat. 1167Minor changes in phraseology only were made.
Amendments1994— substituted “fined under this title” for “fined not more than $5,000”.Pub. L. 103–322
